_readme: Dashboard metrics. price_series tracks the cheapest API model matching or beating original GPT-4 (March 2023) on standard benchmarks — usd_per_mtok is INPUT price per million tokens. token_rate feeds the altar counter. Update weekly, then git push to deploy.

token_rate.note: Conservative industry-wide estimate. Google alone disclosed 3.2 quadrillion tokens/month (~1.2B tok/s) at I/O 2026, up 7x YoY; this figure extrapolates across all providers.

price_series.label: Price of GPT-4-class intelligence, USD per million input tokens
